title: caulanthus major
intro: Caulanthus major, also known as rock cabbage, is a type of wild mustard plant that belongs to the Brassicaceae family. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. It is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared in various ways for medicinal use, including as a tea, tincture, or capsule, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and potential interactions with other medications.
